sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36738" key="e)canaisqhte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαν-αισθητέω</orth>, <sense id="n36738.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be utterly without feeling,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.39</biblScope> </bibl> codd.</sense> </entryFree>
